title: A cooking device comprising a spacer
abstract: The present invention relates to a cooking device (1) comprising a body (2) wherein the foodstuffs to be cooked are placed; a door (3) providing access into the body (2); at least one hinge (4) that connects the door (3) to the body (2) and that enables the door (3) to be opened and closed by rotating around its connection axis; a frame (5) that is arranged on the body (2) and against which the door (3) bears when closed.
claims: Claims ( 13 ) A cooking device (1) comprising a body (2) wherein the foodstuffs to be cooked are placed; a door (3) providing access into the body (2); at least one hinge (4) that connects the door (3) to the body (2) and that enables the door (3) to be opened and closed by rotating around its connection axis; a frame (5) that is arranged on the body (2) and against which the door (3) bears when closed, characterized by -	at least one support element (7) that is arranged at the rear side of the frame (5) facing the body (2) and that extends perpendicular to the edge of the door (3) where the door (3) is fixed to the body (2) and extends parallel to the frame (5), and -	at least one spacer (6) that is arranged between the support element (7) and the frame (5) A cooking device (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by the support element (7) that is fixed onto the body (2) so as to remain behind the frame (5) and extends parallel to the frame (5) along the edges of the body (2) that are perpendicular to each other. A cooking device (1) as in Claim 1 or 2, characterized by the support element (7) that is L-shaped or T-shaped. A cooking device (1) as in Claim 1, characterized by at least one connection element (8) that is arranged on the spacer (6) and that enables the spacer (6) to be fixed onto the support element (7), and at least one connection housing (9) with which the connection element (8) is engaged. A cooking device (1) as in Claim 4, characterized by the connection element (8) comprising a first connection element (108) and a second connection element (208) and the connection housing (9) comprising a first connection housing (109) and a second connection housing (209). A cooking device (1) as in Claim 5, characterized by the first connection housing (109) and the second connection housing (209) that are rectangular, extending along the same horizontal direction on the spacer (6). A cooking device (1) as in Claim 6, characterized by the first connection housing (109) that is rectangular with the long edge thereof extending on the horizontal axis and the second connection housing (209) with the short edge thereof extending on the horizontal axis. A cooking device (1) as in any one of the Claims 5 to 7, characterized by the first connection element (108) and the second connection element (208) that are fitted into the first connection housing (109) and the second connection housing (209) respectively. A cooking device (1) as in any one of the claims 5 to 8, characterized by the L-shaped first connection element (108). A cooking device (1) as in any one of the claims 5 to 9, characterized by the C-shaped second connection element (208). A cooking device (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by one or more than one fixing hole (11) that is arranged on the hinge (4), the frame (5), the spacer (6) and the support element (7) and that aligns with each other when the spacer (6) is seated onto the support element (7), and one or more than one fixing element (10) that provides the fixing by passing through at least one of the fixing holes (11). A cooking device (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the door (3) that opens sideways. A cooking device (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the spacer (6) that is produced from plastic material.
